name: SplashEZ 3-in-1 Splash Pad, Sprinkler for Kids & Baby Pool for Learning – Toddler Sprinkler Pool, 60’’ Outside Water Toys – “from A to Z” Outdoor Play Mat for Babies & Toddlers
bullets: MAKE LEARNING A BLAST – Time for a splish-splashin’ bash in SplashEZ’s educational water splash pad! Created by loving parents, with the aim of making learning easy and fun. SplashEZ innovative pool has a learning mat for a base, so your little squirt soaks up some knowledge during play!

TAKE A DIP IN ONE COOL POOL – Get relief from the heat with the SplashEZ inflatable kiddy pool for children 12 months or older. Cherish the moments as your toddler outdoor toys under the refreshing fountain sprinklers! This summer toy creates oceans of adventures baby & toddler toys!

SPLASH SAFELY – Keep kids cool and safe with SplashEZ’s parent-approved outdoor water toys for toddlers. Fun in the sun… and shade, this shallow wading pool and water sprinkler promises uncompromised quality and is BPA and phthalates free

LEARNING THROUGH PLAY – We’ve got fun down to a science. Educators, psychologists, and researchers all agree that learning through play is key to a child’s healthy development. SplashEZ gives your baby both learning and outdoor playset in one incredible pool! great summer activities!

PROUD AMERICAN COMPANY – As parents, we know nothing comes before the safety of our kids and the quality of their toys! If for any reason your purchase isn’t right for you, then reach out to SplashEZ customer care. We’ll happily make things right now

reviews.name: Robert Hebert
reviews.title: Fun and easy to set up
reviews.body: My kids loved the splash pad. They don’t like to stay inside pools so this was the next best thing for them to enjoy some water play during the hot hours of the day. I like that it was easy to blow up took about two minutes and took about two minutes to get the water to sprinkle out of the holes. It hold a good amount of water for a splash pad abd it helped keep the use of the water to a moderate…

reviews.name: DJF
reviews.title: Great for toddler, bonus, dog loved it!
reviews.body: My 2 1/2 liked it once she got used to the sprinklers. Bonus, the dog loves it. Very sturdy!

reviews.name: Stephanie
reviews.title: The best fun
reviews.body: The media could not be loaded. We’ve had so much fun with this splash pad! It was incredibly easy to set up—just connect the hose, and it was ready to go. I had no issues with assembly or getting the water flowing.The kids absolutely loved it and spent hours playing in it. Honestly, my water bill might be a little higher this month, but seeing how much fun they had made it completely worth it!…

reviews.name: Celina
reviews.title: Not recommended for DOGs
reviews.body: I really wanted this to work for Frank Sinatra, our dog. Unfortunately he go so excited that he bit at the base of on of the streams, and it punctured right away. Got one good use out of it. It was great for that one use. This could be really fun for kids, but think again if you're thinking of getting it for your pup. Especially if they get excited with spouting water.
